personal.name: I Gede Surya Diva Ananda
personal.tagline: Bridging creativity and code — exploring game development, web technologies, and AI to craft meaningful digital experiences.
personal.about: As an Informatics student at Universitas Udayana, I am pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Science with a focus on honing my skills in full-stack web development and exploring AI integration. Through my diverse experiences, including serving as Secretary II of HIMAIF Udayana and interning as a Game Developer at PT. inAReality Studio Nusantara, I have actively contributed to enhancing organizational workflows and exploring creative aspects of software development. My goal is to leverage my technical expertise and collaborative approach to drive innovation and impactful solutions in technology.

experience.role: Front-End Web & Back-End with AI Cohort
experience.description: Developing comprehensive understanding of web application development, front-end technologies, back-end development on AWS platform, and AI integration into web applications.
Learned to create a Game Design Document and successfully prototyped my first game called 'Project Sandikala' within a limited timeframe.
Ensuring seamless flow of paperwork and communication between the organization and the Faculty of Natural Science and Mathematics. Managing permits and documentation for organizational initiatives.
Directed the full event lifecycle for Invention 2024, a national-scale IT competition for hundreds of students. Managed collaboration between teams from different divisions.

projects.title: Project Sandikala
projects.description: A game prototype developed during my internship at PT. inAReality Studio Nusantara. Created within a limited timeframe, featuring complete game design documentation.

certifications: Belajar Membuat Aplikasi Flutter untuk Pemula

seo.title: I Gede Surya Diva Ananda | Technology Enthusiast
